params.negative_prompt: no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no digits, no labels, no stickers, no decals, no placards, no serial tags, no serial plates, no engraved plates, no warning signs, no warning plates, no stamped markings, no screen digits, no icon plates, no symbol plates, no interface readouts, no readable ui, no crowd scene, no multiple readable faces, no room-wide crowd context, no chaotic press-room energy, no press scrum, no hearing-room spectacle, no booklet, no folder, no disconnected speakerphone, no second tabletop device, no giant wall monitor hero
params.note_text: Final v3 beat 03 deliverable. Preserve the clean table-power reversal and the wordless shuttle whiteboard context.
params.accent_palette: off-white, slate blue, charcoal, signal amber
params.safe_zone_intent: preserve a quiet upper band and keep the reversed decision threshold above the subtitle zone
params.signal_anchor: decision-room table where the burden of proof has been reversed and the room itself carries shuttle whiteboard context
params.historical_anchor: NASA and Thiokol decision room where safety had to be proven unsafe to stop launch
params.surreal_breach: the authority split stays calm while the board behind it quietly remembers the shuttle in wordless marker traces

prompt_fragments.anchor_fragment: small institutional decision room with a plain conference table, seated managers on one side, one standing engineer opposite, and a whiteboard behind them carrying simple shuttle-related marker traces
support_fragments: blue and black marker arcs and booster-like whiteboard geometry remain wordless and subordinate to the authority split
the table stays clean and plausible, with no stray booklet or disconnected device pulling focus from the burden-shift read
directives: keep the room institutional and calm rather than chaotic
remove prop noise before adding any extra board context
make the reversal immediate at thumbnail size
